title: Tuples
source_outline: Creating and accessing: packing and indexing
Tuple assignment and unpacking: swapping variables (a, b = b, a)
Immutability: when to prefer a tuple over a list
Basic tuple operations: concatenation, repetition, membership

artifact_plan.profile_note: Corpus suggested atomic (1390w); human chose standard at HITL#2. Corpus expanded with genuine content (count()/index() methods, lexicographic comparison, tuple() constructor, Implementation section, more examples) to clear the standard floor — not padding.
artifact_plan.diagram_note: Purely textual/syntactic; tuple-vs-list contrast served by a markdown table, no rendered glyph needed.

next_assessment.title: Data Structures Portfolio
next_assessment.outcome: The learner can choose and manipulate the right Python data structure for a given data-handling task.
